description: Paired 10-seed confirmation around the threshold found by the five-level elderly ride-hailing preference screen.
scope_notes: This confirmation follows the paired five-level 3-seed screen and does not replace its output.
Only the 60+ ride-hailing age-mode constant changes; all non-age inputs and random values remain paired.
Selection must be based on behavioral plausibility and stability, not on maximizing elderly ride-hailing demand.
